---
title: "Current Reserach"
---

[Sea Turtle Nesting Species Distribution Modeling](turtles.html)


[Beach Wrack as a Nature-Based Solution to Dune Restoration](wrack.html)


[Ecogeomorphic Controls on Coastal Dune Morphology](eco-geo-dunes.html)


[Vegetation Recovery in a Trampled Dune Systems](trampling.html)
